name: Gellella Terra Vineyard
tagline: Small-batch wines and small plates, following a family legacy from Tito, Italy.
seoDescription: Gellella Terra Vineyard in Muncy, PA — family-owned, small-batch dry, sweet and dessert wines with paired small plates, carrying on a winemaking legacy from Tito, Italy.

hero.heading: An Italian winemaking legacy, rooted in Muncy.
hero.subheading: A family-owned vineyard carrying on generations of winemaking from Tito, Italy — small-batch dry, sweet, and dessert wines, poured alongside thoughtful small plates and a charming view.

images.heroAlt: Gellella Terra Vineyard in Muncy, PA

about.heading: Generations in the making
body: Gellella Terra carries on a long family legacy of winemakers from Tito, in southern Italy — brought to the rolling countryside of Muncy, Pennsylvania. It's a small, family-owned and operated vineyard where the wines are still made by hand, in small batches.

Come for a tasting and you'll find dry, sweet, and dessert wines paired with delicious small plates, a relaxed tasting space, and a charming view worth lingering over. Tastings and tours are by reservation, so every visit feels personal.

services.title: Small-batch wines
services.description: Handcrafted dry, sweet, and dessert wines made in small lots, the old-family way.

services.title: Tastings & tours
services.description: Reserved tastings and vineyard tours, plus wine-appreciation sessions for groups.

services.title: Wine & small plates
services.description: Thoughtful small plates paired to the wines, meant to be enjoyed slowly with the view.

services.title: Private events
services.description: By-appointment group tastings and gatherings in an intimate, family setting.

hoursNote: Reservations required for tastings and events — call (570) 546-9315.

sections.heading: Wine & small plates
